search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:licensessubscriptions" $orgid$ | rename subscriptionId as "Subscription Id", name as Name, description as Description status as "Status", renewalRequested as "Renewal Requested", startDate as "Start Date", endDate as "End Date" | table "Subscription Id", Name, Description, Status, "Renewal Requested", "Start Date", "End Date"
